speaking_style: Jumps between topics mid-sentence. Lowers voice to a hiss at conspiratorial moments, then forgets to lower it again. Grabs your sleeve to make a point.
backstory_seeds: knows something genuinely true that nobody believes because of how he says it
used to be a sensible man before something happened that he only describes in fragments
has been asked to leave three taverns this week already
carries a scrap of parchment covered in cramped writing he claims proves everything
convinced the miller, the tanner, and the reeve are all in it together
hasn't slept properly in weeks because they watch the house at night
